raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 483 will prohibit the use of prone restraints in K-12 schools.",
    "Prone restraint is one of the most dangerous forms of restraint still used in schools.",
    "Prone restraint is often used on students with special needs and children of color.",
    "In the 2022-2023 school year, California schools used physical restraints on students 6,785 times.",
    "Students with disabilities endured 95.5 percent of the physical restraints, despite making up just 14 percent of the student population.",
    "Prone restraints are applied at a higher rate against Black students.",
    "Over thirty states have already prohibited prone restraint in schools.",
    "California law currently permits prone restraint by trained personnel.",
    "The trauma caused by prone restraint can last a lifetime.",
    "Prone restraint is dangerous, ineffective, and unnecessary."
  ]
}
```
